result.name: Father’s betrayal
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 2 Form: Small stone shaped like a heart Effect: For the next ten minutes, a creature that the user can see is banished from an area 30 feet by 30 feet (9 m by 9 m) around the user. If the creature is within that area when the cypher is activated, they are knocked outside the area and are dazed for one round, hindering their next action.

sections.name: Father’s betrayal
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6 + 2

Form: Small stone shaped like a heart

Effect: For the next ten minutes, a creature that the user can see is banished from an area 30 feet by 30 feet (9 m by 9 m) around the user. If the creature is within that area when the cypher is activated, they are knocked outside the area and are dazed for one round, hindering their next action.
